# Robin — Indie Developer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio and dev notes blog by Robin, a full-stack developer (Go, Vue 3).

## Works / Projects

- [RobinStore](https://robin-2016.github.io/works/robinstore) — Multi-vendor WeChat Mini Program e-commerce platform (Go + Gin + PostgreSQL + Vue 3)
- [Linux Ship Commander](https://robin-2016.github.io/works/ship-commander) — Gamified Linux CLI course running real Alpine Linux in the browser (v86 WASM)
- [EnglishRes](https://englishres.com) — Curated English learning resource directory (Astro + Cloudflare Pages)
- [RobinDevNotes](https://robin-2016.github.io/blog) — Personal dev notes blog (this site)

## Blog

39+ technical articles covering: AI tools (DeepSeek, NotebookLM, Cursor), cloud-native (Kubernetes, CRD, Kubebuilder), IaC (Terraform, Packer), Go backend, Vue 3 frontend.

## About

DevOps and backend engineer. Contact: xuhongbin3241@gmail.com | GitHub: robin-2016
